name: IME for Respiratory Impairment Disputes in Draper

mainEntity.name: How to get a second opinion IME for disputed respiratory impairment in Draper?
mainEntity.text: How to get a second opinion IME for disputed respiratory impairment in Draper?

acceptedAnswer.text: Request via Labor Commission after denial; choose pulmonologist from approved list for objective AMA Guides rating.

suggestedAnswer.text: Draper disputes average 3 IMEs. Costs employer-paid if panel-ordered. Ups rating 25% often. Prep with records.

description: Request via Labor Commission after denial; choose pulmonologist from approved list for objective AMA Guides rating.
